summary: Plugin+MCP lifecycle hardening session. 3 lanes executed in parallel: MCP-TRUTH (env sanitization P0 fix, typed errors, lock safety), TRUST-BOUNDARY (CapabilityId runtime guard, auth corruption fix, as any elimination, secret redaction), PLUGIN-TRUTH (RL-005 Phase 1.5+2 state refactor, TOCTOU fix, bus subscriber staleness fix). 48 trust boundary findings audited, 5 P0 addressed. 7 commits on dev awaiting push.
